description: Write and execute a Python script using PySAM to simulate a standalone 50 MW / 200 MWh lithium-ion NMC battery energy storage system for one year (8,760 hours). Configure the system with a 50,000 kW power rating, 200,000 kWh energy capacity, 10% minimum SOC, and a constant 25°C ambient temperature, targeting ~90% roundtrip efficiency. The simulation must follow a dispatch schedule of charging at full power during hours 0-5, discharging at full power during hours 14-19, and idling during all other hours. Save the script to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/bess_simulation.py and export a JSON file to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/bess_analysis_results.json containing the following metrics: 'battery_power_kw', 'battery_capacity_kwh', 'annual_charge_energy_kwh', 'annual_discharge_energy_kwh', 'roundtrip_efficiency_pct', 'equivalent_full_cycles', and 'simulation_hours'.
